economic_notes: Investment in Keseechiwan Holdings Limited Partnership recorded at cost ($60,000). First Nation maintains a bison inventory. Operates a waste disposal site with environmental liability.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Net financial assets are negative (-$398,741), indicating net debt position. CMHC reserves of $714,302 are restricted. Transfers to reserves of $170,775 recorded. Total government transfers calculated as CMHC + File Hills + First Nations Trust + Government of Saskatchewan + ISC + ISC Health Canada = 398360+370273+334576+234722+8855481+613233 = 10806645; however First Nations Trust and File Hills may be tribal council transfers not direct government. OSR estimated as interest + other income + rental income = 29872+1466825+665924 = 2162621. Deferred revenue of $7,595,330 is significant. Supplementary schedules 1-65 referenced but not included in main statements.
